author: tmiychao
content:
<@&857649635274915900> Welcome to Cohort 7 of Ethereum Protocol Fellowship everyone! The Week 1 starts now and we are officially kicking it off today  🛫 <:eth2:595693639913570305> 

The first phase of the fellowship marks beginning of your research into potential projects, continuing your learning journey in the search for your domain. We are here to support each other and learn from each other by meeting in regular calls and sharing updates. Some of you already started with week 0 but Development Updates are now expect from everyone at least once in 2 weeks. You can also come to share your updates in standup calls on Mondays, other call on Wednesday is dedicated to Office Hours where you can meet our core dev superstars. 

But today is special as we are starting so we have dedicated presentation.** Join our Kick Off Call at 3pm UTC (your time <t:1781535600:F>) to learn all details and instructions for the cohort**, https://meet.ethereum.org/epf-office-hours. We will see you there, answer all your questions and get you ready for your fellowship. Recording and slidse will be shared afterwards

author: tmiychao
content: <@&857649635274915900> We are starting soon! Join us for the cohort kick off soon https://meet.ethereum.org/epf-office-hours
